# Almost Realism Framework

> Hardware-accelerated computation framework for Java with support for CPU, GPU (OpenCL), and Metal backends. Provides PackedCollection for memory-efficient multi-dimensional data, Producer/Evaluable pattern for deferred execution, and modules for machine learning, ray tracing, audio synthesis, and scientific computing.

## Quick Start

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Development guidelines and environment setup
- [Quick Reference](docs/QUICK_REFERENCE.md): Condensed API reference card
- [Documentation Index](docs/index.html): Full documentation portal

## Environment Setup

`AR_HARDWARE_LIBS` is auto-detected — do not set it manually.

## Core Modules

### base/ — Foundation
- [meta](base/meta/README.md): Foundational interfaces — Named, Signature, Destroyable, Lifecycle, Setup, Multiple, Plural | [Details](docs/modules/meta.html)
- [io](base/io/README.md): Console logging, metrics, alerts, file output utilities | [Details](docs/modules/io.html)
- [relation](base/relation/README.md): Producer/Evaluable/Process model — relational computation, deferred execution, process optimization | [Details](docs/modules/relation.html)
- [code](base/code/README.md): Expression trees, Scope management, code generation, kernel indexing | [Details](docs/modules/code.html)
- [collect](base/collect/README.md): Collection module (currently a dependency waypoint — collection types live in code and algebra)
- [hardware](base/hardware/README.md): Hardware acceleration backends (JNI, OpenCL, Metal), memory management | [Details](docs/modules/hardware.html)

### compute/ — Mathematical Domains
- [algebra](compute/algebra/README.md): Vector, Matrix, Scalar, Pair types; PackedCollection; CollectionProducer with 40+ operations | [Details](docs/modules/algebra.html)
- [geometry](compute/geometry/README.md): Ray, TransformMatrix, intersection testing, camera systems | [Details](docs/modules/geometry.html)
- [time](compute/time/README.md): Temporal operations, FFT/IFFT, FIR filtering, signal processing | [Details](docs/modules/time.html)
- [stats](compute/stats/README.md): Probability distributions, statistical sampling | [Details](docs/modules/stats.html)

### domain/ — Domain Models
- [graph](domain/graph/README.md): Cell-Receptor-Transmitter pattern, neural network layers, backpropagation | [Details](docs/modules/graph.html)
- [color](domain/color/README.md): RGB/RGBA, lighting, shaders, textures | [Details](docs/modules/color.html)
- [physics](domain/physics/README.md): Rigid body dynamics, absorbers, photon fields, physical constants | [Details](docs/modules/physics.html)
- [space](domain/space/README.md): Scene management, meshes, spatial acceleration | [Details](docs/modules/space.html)
- [heredity](domain/heredity/README.md): Genetic algorithms, Gene/Chromosome/Genome hierarchy | [Details](docs/modules/heredity.html)
- [chemistry](domain/chemistry/README.md): Periodic table (Element enum), atomic structure, molecular modeling | [Details](docs/modules/chemistry.html)

### engine/ — Applications & Training
- [ml](engine/ml/README.md): Transformer models (Qwen3), StateDictionary, attention, diffusion | [Details](docs/modules/ml.html)
- [optimize](engine/optimize/README.md): ModelOptimizer, loss functions, Adam, evolutionary algorithms | [Details](docs/modules/optimize.html)
- [render](engine/render/README.md): Ray tracing engine, lighting, image output | [Details](docs/modules/render.html)
- [audio](engine/audio/README.md): Audio synthesis, signal processing, filters, MIDI | [Details](docs/modules/audio.html)
- [utils](engine/utils/README.md): Testing framework (TestSuiteBase), code policy enforcement | [Details](docs/modules/utils.html)
- [utils-http](engine/utils-http/README.md): HTTP authentication, event delivery

### extern/ — External Integrations
- [ml-djl](extern/ml-djl/README.md): DJL SentencePiece tokenization
- [ml-onnx](extern/ml-onnx/README.md): ONNX Runtime inference
- [ml-script](extern/ml-script/README.md): Groovy scripting for model definition

### studio/ — Multimedia Composition
- [music](studio/music/README.md): Pattern-based music composition, notes, arrangements | [Details](docs/modules/music.html)
- [compose](studio/compose/README.md): Audio scene orchestration, generative audio, ML integration | [Details](docs/modules/compose.html)
- [spatial](studio/spatial/README.md): Spatial audio visualization | [Details](docs/modules/music.html)

### Standalone
- [tools](tools/README.md): MCP servers, profiling UI
- [flowtree](flowtree/README.md): Workflow orchestration

## Internals Documentation

### Core Concepts
- [Producer/Evaluable Pattern](docs/internals/producer-evaluable-pattern.md): The foundational two-phase execution model — describe computation with Producer, execute with Evaluable
- [Features Pattern](docs/internals/features-pattern.md): The mixin interface pattern (CollectionFeatures, RGBFeatures, etc.) that provides composable capabilities without inheritance
- [Shape and Traversal](docs/internals/shape-and-traversal.md): TraversalPolicy, Shape, Traversable — how multi-dimensional structure is imposed on flat memory
- [PackedCollection Examples](docs/internals/packed-collection-examples.md): Creating, operating on, and managing PackedCollection — the fundamental data type
- [CollectionProducer Operations](docs/internals/collection-producer-operations.md): The fluent API for composing hardware-accelerated operations (add, multiply, reshape, reduce, etc.)
- [StateDictionary](docs/internals/state-dictionary.md): Model weight management — loading, saving, key naming conventions, HuggingFace compatibility

### Compilation Pipeline
- [End-to-End Computation](docs/internals/end-to-end-computation.md): How cp(a).multiply(cp(b)).evaluate() flows from expression to hardware execution
- [Computation Graph to Process Tree](docs/internals/computation-graph-to-process-tree.md): How Producers become Process trees
- [Process Optimization Pipeline](docs/internals/process-optimization-pipeline.md): CascadingOptimizationStrategy, parallelism scoring
- [Backend Compilation and Dispatch](docs/internals/backend-compilation-and-dispatch.md): ComputationScopeCompiler, ExecutionKey caching, native code generation

### Expression and Kernel System
- [Expression Evaluation](docs/internals/expression-evaluation.md): Expression tree evaluation and simplification
- [Dynamic Indexing](docs/internals/dynamic-indexing.md): Runtime index computation in kernels
- [Kernel Count Propagation](docs/internals/kernel-count-propagation.md): How parallelism counts flow through process trees
- [Assignment Optimization](docs/internals/assignment-optimization.md): Element-wise assignment short-circuits
- [OperationList Optimization Flags](docs/internals/operationlist-optimization-flags.md): Batch operation optimization

### Audio and CellList
- [CellList Architecture](docs/internals/celllist-architecture.md): Cell-based audio graph design
- [CellList Fluent API](docs/internals/celllist-fluent-api.md): Chaining audio processing operations
- [CellList Realtime Streaming](docs/internals/celllist-realtime-streaming.md): Low-latency audio output
- [CellList Tick Ordering](docs/internals/celllist-tick-ordering.md): Execution ordering in cell graphs

### ML and Training
- [ML Inference Pipeline](docs/internals/ml-inference-pipeline.md): From loaded weights to generated tokens
- [Training Loop Examples](docs/internals/training-loop-examples.md): ModelOptimizer patterns
- [Sampling Loop Examples](docs/internals/sampling-loop-examples.md): DiffusionSampler patterns

### Testing and Profiling
- [Test Examples](docs/internals/test-examples.md): TestSuiteBase, @TestDepth usage
- [Profiling](docs/internals/profiling.md): Operation profiling infrastructure
- [Profiling Examples](docs/internals/profiling-examples.md): Timing analysis patterns

## Key Patterns

### Process Optimization (CRITICAL)

**MUST call optimize() before get()** when using OperationList:

```java
OperationList op = model.getForward().push(input);
op = (OperationList) op.optimize();
Runnable compiled = op.get();
compiled.run();
```

### Producer/Evaluable (Deferred Execution)
```java
CollectionProducer computation = cp(a).add(cp(b)).multiply(cp(c));
Evaluable<PackedCollection> compiled = computation.get();
PackedCollection result = compiled.evaluate();
```

### PackedCollection (Multi-dimensional Data)
```java
PackedCollection tensor = new PackedCollection(shape(batch, channels, height, width));
```

### Features Pattern (Composable Capabilities)
```java
public class MyProcessor implements CollectionFeatures {
    public PackedCollection process(PackedCollection input) {
        return cp(input).multiply(c(2.0)).add(c(1.0)).evaluate();
    }
}
```

## Module Dependencies

```
meta (foundation)
 +-- io, relation
      +-- code
           +-- collect
                +-- hardware
                     +-- algebra, stats
                          +-- geometry
                               +-- time, color
                                    +-- heredity, physics
                                         +-- graph, chemistry
                                              +-- space
                                                   +-- optimize
                                                        +-- utils
                                                             +-- render, ml, audio, utils-http
```
